description: Hermes hackathon demo: Revenue Forge proves governed agentic commerce with sponsor-native proof packets.

userStories.title: Revenue Forge command center UI
userStories.description: As a judge, I need to immediately understand that this is a governed revenue machine, not a chatbot.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero clearly states revenue forge concept
Agent Circuit and Revenue Packet visible
Spend Warrant and Rail Receipt visible

userStories.title: Interactive forged revenue workflow
userStories.description: As an operator, I can step through the revenue workflow from objective to report.
userStories.notes: Six stages implemented with proof-like slips and ledger.

userStories.title: Budget and Stripe rail visualization
userStories.description: As a judge, I can see how the agent spends safely and creates monetization.
userStories.notes: Spend Warrant and Rail Receipt implemented.

userStories.title: Typed proof packet module
userStories.description: As a builder, I need the Commercial Autonomy Proof packet to be a reusable typed artifact rather than inline component data.
acceptanceCriteria: Proof packet builder lives outside App.tsx
Export JSON and Markdown still work
Proof events include sponsor stack and policy/rail fields
userStories.notes: src/proofPacket.ts contains typed builder, sponsor stack, and Markdown serializer.

userStories.title: Submission docs and demo script
userStories.description: As a submitter, I need a demo script, README, and submission brief ready before video production.
acceptanceCriteria: README explains product, sponsor value, and run commands
userStories.notes: DEMO_SCRIPT.md, SUBMISSION.md, and README.md are ready for submission asset production.
